    client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'archived'})
    assert client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'active'}).status_code == 409

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from solution import app, notifications_train_1_store

PATH = '/notifications-t1'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    notifications_train_1_store.clear()

def test_optional_field_handling():
    missing = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-notifications-alpha-1'}).json()
    explicit = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-notifications-beta-1', 'note': None}).json()
    supplied = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-notifications-gamma-1', 'note': 'ok'}).json()
    assert [missing['note'], explicit['note'], supplied['note']] == [None, None, 'ok']

from solution import app, files_train_2_store

PATH = '/files-t2'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    files_train_2_store.clear()

def test_contract_preserving_refactor():
    created = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-files-alpha-2'})
    assert created.status_code == 201
    assert client.get(PATH + '/1').json() == created.json()

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from solution import app, tasks_train_1_store

PATH = '/tasks-t1'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    tasks_train_1_store.clear()

def test_invalid_state_error_behavior():
    created = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-tasks-alpha-1'}).json()
    client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'archived'})
    assert client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'active'}).status_code == 409

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from solution import app, notifications_train_1_store

PATH = '/notifications-t1'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    notifications_train_1_store.clear()

def test_optional_field_handling():
    missing = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-notifications-alpha-1'}).json()
    explicit = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-notifications-beta-1', 'note': None}).json()
    supplied = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-notifications-gamma-1', 'note': 'ok'}).json()
    assert [missing['note'], explicit['note'], supplied['note']] == [None, None, 'ok']

    supplied = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'train-notifications-gamma-2', 'note': 'ok'}).json()
